name: Measuring Contest
description:
"Hey, looks like you made it"

"Now that you're here... care for a little contest?"

You had received an invite from your two roommates about a contest between you three. Once you've arrived, you caught you roommates without their clothes on and their cocks erect, waiting for you. It then sinks in and you finally realized what kind of contest this is.
